title: 2026年泰国房产中介行业深度解析：收入水平与成功秘诀
desc_original: Thinking about a property sales career? Here is how much real estate agents earn in Thailand and what it takes to succeed in 2026 Legacy Real estate sales is often seen as a high-income career with no ceiling and many are drawn in by the potential to earn large commissions, but just as many leave disappointed after realising the job is more complex than expected. Income structures, required skills, and even new regulations all play a role in determining success in this field. For those consi
summary_cn: 随着2026年泰国房地产市场的演变，房产中介行业正面临新的机遇与挑战。本文深度解析了在泰从事房产中介的收入结构、必备技能及行业新规。虽然高额佣金吸引了众多从业者，但行业竞争激烈且专业要求提升。对于打算在泰国销售公寓（Condo）或别墅的职业人士，理解市场动态及法规变化是成功的关键。该行业已从单纯的带看转向专业的咨询与合规服务。

title: 芭提雅（Pattaya）外卖骑手见义勇为，协助残障外籍人士通过受阻人行道
desc_original: Pattaya taxi rider praised after helping disabled foreigner on blocked footpath Legacy A Thai app-based motorcycle taxi rider was praised online after helping a disabled foreign man in Pattaya when a street light pole blocked a footpath and prevented a wheelchair from passing. A video of the incident circulated on Thai social media this week, showing the rider stopping his motorcycle to assist a foreign couple. The foreign man, who has a leg disability, is seen holding onto a street light po
summary_cn: 一名33岁的泰国网约摩托车骑手Fan因在芭提雅（Pattaya）热心帮助残障外籍游客而获得网友赞誉。当时，原本狭窄的人行道因电线杆阻挡，导致一名推轮椅的残疾外籍男子及其同伴无法通行。该骑手见状主动停车提供协助，视频在社交媒体流传后引发广泛好评。此事也再次引发了公众对泰国城市人行道基础设施对残障人士不友善问题的关注。

title: 呵叻府（Korat）举办体育赛事，球员比赛期间中暑陷入昏迷
desc_original: Heatstroke leaves footballer in coma during Korat sports event Legacy A football match held as part of a local sports event in Nakhon Ratchasima (Korat) ended with an emergency today, March 18, when a player collapsed due to heatstroke during play and was taken to the hospital. The incident happened during a special fixture at a football field in Ma Roeng subdistrict, Mueang district, Nakhon Ratchasima province, staged under the second “Sports for Relationship Building on Thai Local Governmen
summary_cn: 3月18日，在泰国呵叻府（Nakhon Ratchasima / Korat）举行的一场为增进地方政府关系的特别足球赛中，一名球员因突发热中暑在场上晕倒并陷入昏迷。事发于该府直辖县Ma Roeng区的一个足球场。随着泰国进入酷热季节，此次突发医疗紧急事件再次为高温下的户外体育活动敲响警钟。医疗团队已将其紧急送往医院救治。

title: 翻翻零钱包：1999版25萨当硬币售价暴涨至5000泰铢
desc_original: A small coin with big value is making waves online after a local shop offered up to 5,000 baht for a rare 25-satang coin — about 2 million per cent above its face value. Panan Jewellery posted a video announcing it is buying 25-satang coins, but with one key condition: the coin must be minted in 1999 (B.E. 2542). “Just a 25-satang coin from 1999 can be worth up to 5,000 baht. If you have one, send us a photo for appraisal,” the page admin said. The specific coin features a portrait of Bhumibol Adul
summary_cn: 泰国知名回收店Panan Jewellery发布消息，高价求购1999年（佛历2542年）发行的25萨当硬币。这种硬币现在的市场回收价高达5,000泰铢，溢价倍数惊人。该款硬币正面为普密蓬国王（Bhumibol Adulyadej）肖像，背面为洛坤府（Nakhon Si Thammarat）的玛哈泰寺。民众被提醒检查自己的零钱，若持有此年份硬币可联系店家进行估价鉴定。

title: 碧差汶府（Phetchabun）男子网骗预警：斥资4万购买燃油却收到满桶水
desc_original: Thai man warns of petrol scam after paying 40,000 and getting water Legacy A Thai man in Phetchabun warned the public to be cautious when buying fue l during the ongoing shortage, after he paid 40,000 baht for petrol but received a container filled with water . The man posted videos on his Facebook account, อำนาจ โซล่าเซลล์ , on Monday, March 16, showing him and his employees draining water from a well-drilling engine. His caption read, “Warning, paying for petrol but getting water.” In the clip,
summary_cn: 在当前燃油短缺期间，泰国碧差汶府（Phetchabun）发生一起恶性诈骗案。一名经营太阳能设备及钻井业务的男子称，他花费4万泰铢购买燃油，然而收到的容器内装的竟全是水，导致其钻井设备受损停机。受害者在社交媒体发布视频预警，提醒公众在非正规渠道采购能源时务必提高警惕，防止骗徒利用短缺潮进行欺诈。

title: YouTube 撤下冒充 Bitkub 首席执行官的 AI 加密货币诈骗广告
desc_original: YouTube removes AI crypto scam ad impersonating Bitkub CEO Legacy YouTube has removed a scam advertisement from its platform after it was found to use deepfake technology to impersonate a company executive and persuade viewers to invest in cryptocurrency. In a statement, YouTube said its misleading content policies prohibit impersonating public figures for the purpose of deceiving people, including false claims of endorsement or association with a public figure. The platform said its systems
summary_cn: YouTube 平台近日撤下了一则利用 Deepfake AI 技术伪造的加密货币诈骗广告。该广告冒充泰国头部加密货币交易平台 Bitkub 的首席执行官吉拉育（Jirayut Srupsrisopa），诱导观众进行投资。YouTube 声明称，其内容政策严禁伪装公众人物进行欺诈。尽管平台拥有广告监控系统，但 AI 换脸诈骗仍然层出不穷。Bitkub 此前已多次提醒投资者，警惕任何虚假背书或承诺高额回报的非官方金融宣传。
title_cn: YouTube 撤下冒充 Bitkub 首席执行官的 AI 加密货币诈骗广告

title: 泰国航空业成本激增，航空协会 AAT 寻求政府救济
desc_original: Thai aviation industry costs rise as AAT seeks government relief Legacy The Airline Association of Thailand (AAT) has met executives from six member airlines to discuss rising cost pressures on the Thai aviation industry , as it prepares to ask the government for urgent relief measures. The AAT said it recently convened a meeting with top management from its member airlines: Bangkok Airways, Thai AirAsia, Thai AirAsia X, Nok Air, Thai Lion Air and Thai VietJet. The discussion focused on curr
summary_cn: 泰国航空公司协会（AAT）近期召集曼谷航空（Bangkok Airways）、泰国亚航、鸟航（Nok Air）等六家成员航空公司高管开会，商讨应对泰国航空业不断攀升的成本压力。受全球经济波动及外部负面因素影响，各大航司运营压力巨大。AAT 指出，由于运营成本剧增，计划向政府提出紧急救济申请。此举旨在保障泰国旅游业复苏背景下，航空运输链条的稳定性，避免经营困境导致机票价格进一步异常波动。
title_cn: 泰国航空业成本激增，航空协会 AAT 寻求政府救济

title: 暖武里府 Nonthaburi 一母亲举报排球教练多次殴打儿子
desc_original: Mother files complaint after volleyball coach repeatedly beats son Legacy A mother filed a complaint yesterday, March 17, with the Crime Suppression Division after alleging an assistant volleyball coach at a sports school in Nonthaburi province repeatedly beat her son with a stick . On Phahonyothin Road, จ่าคิงส์ แตงทิม สะพานใหม่, a social assistance worker, accompanied 46 year old Anisa to meet investigators to seek legal action against the assistant coach. Her son, 18 year old Max, joined t
summary_cn: 3月17日，一名46岁的母亲向犯罪打击分局（CSD）报案，称其18岁的儿子在暖武里府（Nonthaburi）的一所体育学校遭助理排球教练多次体罚。据悉，受害者原本梦想成为职业球员，但在校期间遭到教练持木棍殴打。这名母亲在社会救助人员的陪同下前往拍凤裕庭路（Phahonyothin Road）的相关部门寻求司法公正，要求对施暴者采取法律行动。该事件再次引发了泰国民众对于体育教育中体罚现象的广泛讨论。
title_cn: 暖武里府 Nonthaburi 一母亲举报排球教练多次殴打儿子

title: 2026年度芭提雅音乐节本周末重返中天海滩 Jomtien Beach
desc_original: PATTAYA, Thailand – Music fans are preparing for another energetic weekend as the Pattaya Music Festival 2026 continues with its second week of performances at Jomtien Beach on March 13–14.
summary_cn: 2026年芭提雅音乐节本周末进入第二周的狂欢。3月13日至14日，音乐节舞台将设在热门的中天海滩（Jomtien Beach），届时将有众多知名乐队和歌手登台献艺。作为芭提雅全月系列文化活动的一部分，该音乐节旨在通过动感的音乐与滨海风情吸引国内外游客。建议前往中天海滩或居住在周边的游客提前规划交通路径，部分路段可能会出现临时拥堵。
title_cn: 2026年度芭提雅音乐节本周末重返中天海滩 Jomtien Beach

title: 芭提雅音乐节点燃中天海滩：后续舞台将移至格兰岛与纳库鲁阿
desc_original: The Pattaya Music Festival 2026, themed around the city’s rhythmic coastal energy, continues to draw large crowds eager for live music against the scenic backdrop of Jomtien Beach. With more weekends ahead—including upcoming stops at Koh Larn and Lan Pho Na Klua Public Park—the festival is set to keep the beats going strong all month long.
summary_cn: 2026年芭提雅音乐节持续升温，吸引了大量观众前往中天海滩（Jomtien Beach）体验现场音乐。本次活动不仅局限于市区，接下来的周末，演出舞台还将计划移至深受游客喜爱的格兰岛（Koh Larn）以及纳库鲁阿兰坡公园（Lan Pho Na Klua Public Park）。官方希望通过这种巡回演出的形式，全面展示芭提雅不同海岸区域的独特魅力，将节日氛围从城市中心延伸至周边海岛。
title_cn: 芭提雅音乐节点燃中天海滩：后续舞台将移至格兰岛与纳库鲁阿
Tomorrowland 2026 电音节重磅登陆芭提雅（Pattaya），泰国站门票抢购一空
desc_original: The event is scheduled to take place in Pattaya, Thailand, from December 11 to December 13, 2026, signaling a new era for the festival’s international presence.
summary_cn: 全球顶尖电音盛事 Tomorrowland 官宣将于2026年12月11日至13日在泰国芭提雅（Pattaya）举行。此次活动标志着该节庆国际化布局的新纪元。目前泰国站门票已全线售罄，显示出东南亚市场对顶级 EDM 产业的巨大需求，预计将极大带动芭提雅届时的旅游及周边服务业增长。

title_cn: 2026-2027年度泰国演唱会指南及票务信息汇总
desc_original: Find concert tickets in Thailand in 2026 with JamBase.
summary_cn: JamBase 平台发布了 2026 年至 2027 年泰国境内的最新演唱会票务指南。随着泰国政府将自身定位为东南亚娱乐枢纽（Entertainment Hub），未来两年内将有大量国际艺人及乐队在曼谷（Bangkok）等地举办演出。该资讯为乐迷提供了便捷的巡演时间表查询及购票链接整合。

title_cn: 2026年泰国宋干节（Songkran）攻略：全国泼水狂欢将于4月13日开启
desc_original: Thailand is preparing for nationwide celebrations for Songkran 2026, which will take place from April 13–15, with major events organised across the country as well as extended “Wan Lai” festivals in Chon Buri province.
summary_cn: 泰国正全力筹备 2026 年宋干节（Songkran）全国性庆祝活动，法定日期为 4 月 13 日至 15 日。除了曼谷等地的核心活动外，春武里府（Chon Buri）还将举行标志性的“万莱”（Wan Lai）延续庆典。该传统节日作为泰国的软实力支柱，预计将吸引数十万国际游客参与，带动全国性旅游消费高峰。
source: Thailand fireworks Songkran New Year cel

title_cn: 2026年 UFI 亚太峰会在曼谷举行，吸引 260 名全球行业代表
desc_original: The UFI Asia-Pacific Conference 2026 was held on 5–6 March 2026 in Bangkok, Thailand Over 260 delegates from across Asia and beyond joined in Bangkok Conference hosted by the Thailand Convention & Exhibition Bureau (TCEB) at the Queen Sirikit ...
summary_cn: 2026年 UFI 亚太区会议于 3 月 5 日至 6 日在曼谷诗丽吉王后国家会议中心（Queen Sirikit National Convention Center）圆满落幕。本次会议由泰国会展局（TCEB）主办，汇集了来自亚太及全球超过 260 名会展行业代表。此次盛会巩固了曼谷作为区域会展中心（MICEHub）的领先地位。
source: Bangkok Pattaya art exhibition museum cu

title_cn: 2026年曼谷（Bangkok）艺术新浪潮：传统与现代公共空间的融合
desc_original: Bangkok’s art scene in 2026 doesn’t just feel bigger, it feels more usable. New spaces are acting less like quiet showrooms and more like public rooms for the city. That shift is shaping a fresh kind of “Thai-ness,” one that can hold ...
summary_cn: 2026年曼谷的艺术风景正经历深刻转型，新兴艺术空间正从传统的静谧展厅转变为更具互动性的城市公共空间。这种变化不仅重塑了当代“泰式风情”的定义，也让艺术更深地融入市民日常生活。这种“艺术民主化”趋势正成为曼谷吸引国际创意人才和高净值文化游客的新增长点。
source: Bangkok Pattaya art exhibition museum cu

title: All Events in Bangkok, Today and Upcoming Events in Bangkok
title_cn: 2026年曼谷国际园艺技术展览会（HortEx）将于5月在 BITEC 会展中心举办
desc: HortEx - 2026 is happening on Wed 20 May 2026 from 9:00 AM onwards at Bangkok International Trade &amp; Exhibition Centre (BITEC)
desc_original: HortEx - 2026 is happening on Wed 20 May 2026 from 9:00 AM onwards at Bangkok International Trade & Exhibition Centre (BITEC)
summary_cn: 2026年曼谷国际园艺技术展览会（HortEx 2026）定于2026年5月20日上午9点起在曼谷国际贸易展览中心（BITEC）拉开帷幕。作为该地区重要的园艺和花卉栽培行业盛会，本次展览将聚焦现代农业技术、温室管理及采后处理等前沿领域，为专业人士提供贸易与技术交流平台。
source: Bangkok Pattaya art exhibition museum cu

title: Why modern art museum Dib Bangkok is a must-visit destination in Thailand | South China Morning Post
title_cn: 曼谷新锐当代艺术馆 Dib Bangkok 成为泰国必打卡文化地标
desc: Explore Dib Bangkok, a new contemporary art museum in a converted warehouse – its inaugural exhibition is showcasing works by 40 artists until August 3.
desc_original: Explore Dib Bangkok, a new contemporary art museum in a converted warehouse – its inaugural exhibition is showcasing works by 40 artists until August 3.
summary_cn: 近期走红的 Dib Bangkok 艺术馆坐落于曼谷由旧仓库改造而成的当代空间内，目前正在举办首届开幕大展。展览将持续至8月3日，汇集了40位知名艺术家的杰作。该项目因其工业复古风与现代艺术的完美融合，已成为曼谷潮流旅游和文化探索的热门目的地，值得艺术爱好者前往体验。
source: Bangkok Pattaya art exhibition museum cu

title: Thailand Goes Global: Ministry of Commerce Unveils DITP EXPO 2026
title_cn: 泰国商务部启动 DITP EXPO 2026 博览会，助力本土企业走向国际
desc: The expo will be held from March 11-13, 2026, at the Ministry of Commerce and will feature 135 companies with export-potential products.
desc_original: The expo will be held from March 11-13, 2026, at the Ministry of Commerce and will feature 135 companies with export-potential products.
summary_cn: 泰国国际贸易促进厅（DITP）于3月11日至13日在商务部总部举办了 DITP EXPO 2026 博览会。本次活动汇聚了135家极具出口潜力的泰国本土企业，旨在向全球市场展示泰国制造业的多样性与创新力，提升泰国品牌的国际认知度，是观察泰国出口贸易动向的重要窗口。
source: Thailand shopping festival fair expo Ban
